Service management, analytics, communication, IMU, and build scripts for Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[common](common/README.md)**: Analytics, battery, Bluetooth, communication, compositor, data retrieval, HRM, i18n, legacy, timer, storage, touch management, and various service files for Pebble firmware.
- **[imu](imu/README.md)**: Defines an enumeration for IMU coordinate axes.
- **[normal](normal/README.md)**: Manages various services and functionalities in Pebble firmware, including communication, data management, and device interactions.
- **[prf](prf/README.md)**: Handles accessory modes, analytics, Bluetooth management, app sessions, and implements an idle watchdog.

## Files
- **[runlevel.def](runlevel.def.md)**: Defines run level constants for different operational states.
- **[runlevel.h](runlevel.h.md)**: Defines a runlevel system for managing service states in the firmware, analogous to UNIX SysVinit.
- **[runlevel_impl.h](runlevel_impl.h.md)**: Defines runlevel implementation details, including enums and enable-mask logic for service activation.
- **[services.c](services.c.md)**: Manages service initialization and runlevel settings, including runlevel listing and switching.
- **[services.h](services.h.md)**: Functions to initialize services required by the kernel.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for configuring and compiling Pebble firmware services with platform-specific exclusions.
